nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 圣卡塔琳娜州
nodes.summary: 圣卡塔琳娜州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、锯嘴蜂鸟等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴伊亞州
nodes.summary: 巴伊亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联118种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Pygmy nightjar等118种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cinnamon-vented piha
nodes.summary: Cinnamon-vented piha（Cinnamon-vented piha，学名 Lipaugus lanioides），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于巴伊亞州、圣卡塔琳娜州，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinnamon-vented piha is found in southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south to northeastern Santa Catarina

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The cinnamon-vented piha is found in southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south to northeastern Santa Catarina

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The species inhabits humid montane forest, mostly at elevations between

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The most significant threat is the extensive destruction and fragmentation of Atlantic forest throughout its range, caused by conversion for agriculture, human settlements and logging." Despite the large population estimated by the IUCN, other sources consider it rare. It appears to occupy only about 10% of its former range.Loiselle, B.A., Graham, C.H., Goerck, J.M., and Ribeiro, M.C
